arts.ttl: GALLERY: 34 of the best pics as Wigan Athletic fans enjoy the 2-1 FA Cup second-round victory at Cambridge United
arts.sum: Our man Bernard Platt was in and among the crowd at the Abbey Stadium as Wigan Athletic left it late before beating Cambridge United 2-1 after extra-time to advance to round three of the FA Cup.
